posts.highlight: 拍了几年才看见真正的巴厘岛
posts.description: Jord Hammond reflects on moving past tourist landmarks to find Bali's hidden, personal, quiet beauty after years of photography
posts.description_zh: 摄影师 Jord 在巴厘岛拍了几年后，终于从火山、寺庙等经典地标转向了那些更安静、更私密的时刻
posts.caption_en: When I first started photographing Bali, I was mostly drawn to the obvious landmarks... The volcanoes, temples and dramatic light. But after years, I started to notice the quieter, more personal moments hiding in plain sight.
posts.caption_zh: 刚开始拍巴厘岛时，我被那些显而易见的地标吸引——火山、寺庙、戏剧性的光线。但拍了几年后，我开始注意到那些藏在日常里更安静、更私密的瞬间。
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Jord Hammond reflects on moving past tourist landmarks to find Bali's hidden, personal, quiet beauty after years of photography. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.highlight: AI帮泰迪生成飞翔照 · 指令太难了
posts.description: Japanese Toy Poodle Nico's owner used AI to generate a flying/jumping photo, hilariously hard to prompt correctly
posts.description_zh: 日本泰迪犬主人用AI给爱犬生成飞翔照，结果发现给AI下指令好难😂 反复修改才出了效果
posts.caption_en: みんなの真似してニコも飛んでみたよ🪶 (I had Nico try flying too, copying everyone 🪶) AI-generated, but the failures were funny — had to keep correcting: 'Nico is thinner!' 'Like jumping on a trampoline!'
posts.caption_zh: 跟风让Nico也飞起来🪶 用AI生成但失败了好多次——[Nico更瘦一点][要像跳蹦床一样]😂 跟AI沟通真的好难
